tips_en: I recommend starting with PhysBrain 1.0, as its approach to bridging human egocentric video and robot control via physical commonsense offers an intuitive and broadly applicable solution to embodied AI data scarcity. It connects naturally to MMSkills, which similarly structures multimodal knowledge for visual agents, while Causal Forcing++ advances the real-time video generation infrastructure that could power such interactive environments.
tips_zh: 建议优先阅读 PhysBrain 1.0，它通过将人类第一视角视频转化为结构化物理常识来解决具身智能的数据稀缺问题，思路直观且影响广泛。它与 MMSkills 在构建多模态智能体知识方面形成互补，而 Causal Forcing++ 则为这类交互式环境提供了实时视频生成的技术基础。
